profiles.name: Alex
profiles.interests: hiking, film photography, machine learning, cheap flights
profiles.hobbies: climbing gym twice a week, cooking things that don't need a recipe, losing to my roommate at chess
profiles.biography: Backend dev who spends most of PR reviews thinking about where I'd rather be hiking. Once got so lost on a solo trail I had to be walked out by a park ranger, would do it again. Send me your favorite trail and I'll probably show up unprepared.

profiles.name: Priya
profiles.interests: Kathak, astronomy apps, secondhand clothes, cricket commentary
profiles.hobbies: gouache painting, midnight stargazing on the terrace, thrifting on Sunday mornings
profiles.biography: I design buildings that follow code and dream up ones that don't. Can identify maybe four constellations with total confidence and I will not be corrected. My family thinks my thrifted lamp collection is a problem. It is not.

profiles.name: Marcus
profiles.interests: boxing gyms, vinyl hunting, balcony vegetables, old jazz
profiles.hobbies: sparring on Tuesdays, growing tomatoes badly, arguing about Coltrane vs Davis
profiles.biography: History teacher, amateur boxer, worse gardener than either of those titles suggest. My tomato plants have died three summers running and I keep trying anyway. Bring strong opinions about jazz, I have stronger ones.

profiles.name: Sofia
profiles.interests: coral reefs, terrible horror movies, sourdough, snorkeling
profiles.hobbies: feeding my sourdough starter (his name is Gary), bad movie nights, weekend dives
profiles.biography: I study coral for work, which means I've cried about bleaching events more than a normal person should. Gary the sourdough starter is doing better than most of my relationships. Snorkeling date? I promise not to talk exclusively about fish.

profiles.name: Daniel
profiles.interests: chess openings, home brewing, cycling routes, cheap horror games
profiles.hobbies: correspondence chess, brewing a beer nobody likes but me, long rides with no destination
profiles.biography: I think about attack vectors all day and somehow still fall for phishing emails from my own mom. Brewed a beer once that my friends politely call 'ambitious.' Will absolutely challenge you to chess before dinner arrives.

profiles.name: Aisha
profiles.interests: running slow 10ks, subtitled films, journaling, hospital coffee
profiles.hobbies: half marathon training, film club Wednesdays, terrible handwriting journaling
profiles.biography: Resident doctor who runs to process the day and journals badly to process the run. Have strong, possibly unhinged opinions on foreign films. If I show up tired it's because I was up since 4am, not because I'm not interested.

profiles.name: Ben
profiles.interests: woodworking mistakes, indie games, camping gear reviews, history podcasts
profiles.hobbies: building furniture that's slightly crooked, half-finished game prototypes, car camping
profiles.biography: I make roadmaps at work and furniture on weekends, both are usually a little off-schedule. Currently three years into an indie game I swear is almost done. Camping trip once ended with me sleeping in the car, ask about it.

profiles.name: Elena
profiles.interests: opera on cheap tickets, house wine, travel notebooks, salsa
profiles.hobbies: salsa on Thursdays, collecting wine I can't actually afford, filling travel journals I never finish
profiles.biography: Worked in three countries, still can't cook rice properly in any of them. I buy wine slightly above my budget and journal about trips I take slightly over budget too. Dance floor is where I'm most fluent.

profiles.name: Omar
profiles.interests: startups, pickup basketball, open mic disasters, investing memes
profiles.hobbies: 3am Slack messages to myself, getting dunked on at the park, bombing at comedy open mics
profiles.biography: Running a startup means I've cried in a bathroom and pitched a VC in the same week. I play pickup basketball to remember what losing gracefully looks like. Once did five minutes at an open mic, got one laugh, from myself.

profiles.name: Grace
profiles.interests: houseplants I keep alive, pottery I keep breaking, loose leaf tea
profiles.hobbies: wheel throwing (mostly bowls, always lopsided), plant propagation, tea ceremony attempts
profiles.biography: I design gardens professionally and somehow still overwater my own plants. My pottery output is 90% lopsided bowls, all beloved. Come over for tea if you can handle mismatched mugs I made myself.

profiles.name: Jack
profiles.interests: old motorcycles, cheap whiskey, dive bars with live music, riverbank fishing
profiles.hobbies: restoring a bike that's been 'almost done' for two years, fly fishing badly, chasing local bands
profiles.biography: Fix engines for work, fix nothing at home, my motorcycle restoration has outlived two relationships. I catch maybe one fish per five trips and consider that a win. Recommend me a dive bar and I'm there.

profiles.name: Nina
profiles.interests: true crime podcasts, aerial silks, overpiped cakes, group chats about murder
profiles.hobbies: aerial classes twice a week, decorating cakes nobody asked for, texting my group chat theories mid-podcast
profiles.biography: I listen to people professionally and then unwind by listening to true crime podcasts, no notes on what that says about me. My cake decorating skill peaked around buttercream roses and hasn't moved since. Ask me my top three unsolved cases.

profiles.name: Kevin
profiles.interests: telescope building, bouldering, chess.com blitz, indie game jams
profiles.hobbies: building a telescope that's been in pieces for a year, bouldering V3 on a good day, losing chess on time pressure
profiles.biography: I model things at work and my telescope build has been 'almost collimated' since last spring. Bouldering V3 is my ceiling and I've made peace with it. Will absolutely lose you at chess if you play fast.

profiles.name: Isabella
profiles.interests: secondhand sewing patterns, salsa nights, shelter volunteering, city murals
profiles.hobbies: sewing clothes that don't always fit, dancing badly on purpose, mural hunting on the weekend
profiles.biography: I sketch for clients during the day and sew for myself at night, results vary wildly. Volunteer at a shelter on Saturdays, it keeps me honest. Take me to find a new mural and I'll take too many photos of it.

profiles.name: Ryan
profiles.interests: spreadsheets, sprint triathlons, old fashioneds, secondhand sci-fi paperbacks
profiles.hobbies: training for a triathlon I'm not fast at, mixing cocktails that are too strong, buying more sci-fi books than I read
profiles.biography: I model spreadsheets at work and my swim times are humbling in the best way. I make a strong old fashioned and a stronger case for reading the book before the show. Currently 40 unread paperbacks deep, no regrets.

profiles.name: Fatima
profiles.interests: carbon audits, trail running, Arabic calligraphy, plant-based cooking fails
profiles.hobbies: practicing calligraphy that never looks like the tutorial, weekend trail runs, cooking vegan food that occasionally works
profiles.biography: I audit companies' emissions for work and my own carbon footprint via one too many flights. My calligraphy looks nothing like the reference photos and I refuse to stop trying. Ask about the tofu dish that went horribly wrong last week.

profiles.name: Leo
profiles.interests: night photography, skateboarding falls, film scoring on a cracked laptop, empty parking garages at 2am
profiles.hobbies: skating (badly, with scars to prove it), scoring short films on secondhand software, wandering the city at odd hours
profiles.biography: I make short films that mostly play to my friends and a very patient laptop. My scars tell a better story than my skating skills do. If you're up for a 2am walk to nowhere, we'll get along.

profiles.name: Maya
profiles.interests: fMRI data, drone footage, silent retreats I can't stay silent for, mountain trails
profiles.hobbies: flying a drone I've crashed twice, attempting meditation retreats and failing at the silence part, weekend hikes
profiles.biography: I study attention for a living and have none for a ten-day silent retreat, made it four days once. Crashed my drone into a lake trying to get 'the shot.' Trail hikes are where I actually manage to be present.

profiles.name: Carlos
profiles.interests: Sunday league soccer, secondhand vinyl, home brewing gone wrong, cheap flights
profiles.hobbies: playing soccer with a bad knee, DJing to an audience of my cat, brewing beer that occasionally explodes
profiles.biography: I build bridges for work and my home brew setup has literally blown a bottle cap across the kitchen. Sunday league soccer with a knee that's seen better decades. My cat is my most loyal DJ set audience.

profiles.name: Emma
profiles.interests: manuscript plot holes, secondhand bookstores, museum member days, slow half marathons
profiles.hobbies: running just fast enough to finish, book club where nobody finishes the book, museum wandering
profiles.biography: I fix other people's plot holes for a living and still can't plan a plot for my own weekend. Book club is 80% wine, 20% actual book talk. Ask me for a museum recommendation, I have strong niche opinions.

profiles.name: Arjun
profiles.interests: half-built robots, weekend cricket, paddleboard wipeouts, spice experiments
profiles.hobbies: robotics side projects that rarely work first try, paddleboarding (badly), cooking with too much chili
profiles.biography: I build robots for work that mostly work, and cook food at home that mostly doesn't. Weekend cricket is sacred, paddleboarding is humbling. If you like spicy food more than your body can handle, we'll get along.

profiles.name: Chloe
profiles.interests: too many houseplants, secondhand vinyl, redecorating on a budget, weekend flea markets
profiles.hobbies: propagating plants I don't have room for, hunting for vinyl at flea markets, rearranging furniture at 11pm
profiles.biography: I design other people's spaces and mine still has moving boxes I refuse to unpack. Somewhere around 38 plants now, my landlord has opinions. If you can help me carry a secondhand couch up three flights, we're basically dating.

profiles.name: Tariq
profiles.interests: philosophy papers I half-finish, jiu-jitsu, chess club drama, travel journaling
profiles.hobbies: getting tapped out at jiu-jitsu, writing essays I never publish, chess club on Thursdays
profiles.biography: I teach philosophy and get humbled on the jiu-jitsu mat by students half my size. My essay drafts folder is a graveyard of good intentions. Come debate free will with me, I promise to actually finish the argument this time.

profiles.name: Hana
profiles.interests: lopsided pottery, expired film rolls, loose leaf tea, quiet hikes
profiles.hobbies: throwing pots that rarely survive the kiln, shooting film I forget to develop for months, tea tasting alone
profiles.biography: I design for clients all week and throw pottery that mostly cracks in the kiln on weekends. Found a roll of film in my bag from eight months ago, still haven't developed it. Slow mornings and good tea, that's the whole pitch.

profiles.name: Noah
profiles.interests: particle physics, backyard telescopes, backpacking on a budget, dive bar jazz
profiles.hobbies: stargazing from a light-polluted balcony, backpacking with gear held together by duct tape, jazz nights
profiles.biography: I research particles for work and can barely see a planet from my balcony, city lights ruin everything. My backpacking gear is 40% duct tape at this point. Currently saving for a trip through South America, budget version.

profiles.name: Layla
profiles.interests: immigration cases, salsa lessons, protest playlists, weekend trails
profiles.hobbies: dancing off a hard week in court, volunteering for causes I actually believe in, exploring new trails
profiles.biography: I fight cases that keep me up at night and dance them off the next morning. My volunteer schedule is a mess but my heart's in it. Long trail conversations are where I do my best thinking, or complaining.

profiles.name: Ethan
profiles.interests: unfinished indie games, anime backlogs, bouldering scrapes, ramen experiments
profiles.hobbies: coding a game I've restarted three times, bouldering with more scrapes than sends, chasing the perfect ramen broth
profiles.biography: My indie game has been 'almost ready' for two years, ask literally anyone in my life. Bouldering gives me more bruises than progress but I keep going back. Currently on attempt number nine of a decent tonkotsu broth.

profiles.name: Zara
profiles.interests: thrifted denim, half-finished poems, morning yoga, slow travel
profiles.hobbies: upcycling clothes I probably shouldn't have bought, writing poems I never finish, yoga before coffee
profiles.biography: I help companies cut waste for work and still have a drawer of thrifted clothes I haven't upcycled yet. My poems mostly stay unfinished in a notes app. Slow travel over rushed itineraries, always.

profiles.name: Felix
profiles.interests: backyard beehives, jazz piano I'm rusty at, mismatched cocktail recipes, honey experiments
profiles.hobbies: tending two beehives (one is more cooperative than the other), relearning piano I quit at twelve, mixing drinks that don't always work
profiles.biography: I cook professionally and keep bees badly as a hobby, one hive is thriving, the other is a mess. Relearning piano at 30 is humbling. Come over, I'll feed you honey from a hive with an attitude problem.

profiles.name: Amara
profiles.interests: afrobeat playlists, small business chaos, flea market hauls, dance classes
profiles.hobbies: dance classes I show up late to, running a boutique that's always one crisis from closing, market hunting on weekends
profiles.biography: Running my own shop means I've cried over inventory spreadsheets more than I'd like to admit. Dance class is the one hour a week I don't think about invoices. Flea market finds are my love language.

profiles.name: Lucas
profiles.interests: bad coffee roasts, mountain treks, film cameras that jam, secondhand paperbacks
profiles.hobbies: roasting coffee that's occasionally burnt, leading treks that occasionally get rained out, fixing a jammed film camera
profiles.biography: I guide treks professionally and my own coffee roasts are hit or miss, mostly miss. My film camera jams on the best shots every single time. Give me a mountain, a book, and bad coffee and I'm content.

profiles.name: Sana
profiles.interests: messy spreadsheets, k-drama marathons, overambitious pastries, weekend hikes
profiles.hobbies: baking pastries that look worse than they taste, crying at k-dramas I swore I wouldn't get invested in, weekend hikes to recover from both
profiles.biography: I clean data at work and my baking attempts need cleaning up too, taste is usually fine, looks less so. Currently emotionally destroyed by a k-drama I will not name. Hikes are how I recover from both spreadsheets and heartbreak.

profiles.name: Gabriel
profiles.interests: small boat sailing, beach cleanup guilt, three guitar chords, marine research
profiles.hobbies: sailing a boat that needs more maintenance than I give it, beach cleanups I sometimes skip, playing guitar badly
profiles.biography: I study ocean ecosystems for work and my sailboat is held together by hope. I organize beach cleanups and still find my own trash sometimes. I know three guitar chords and I will use all of them.

profiles.name: Ines
profiles.interests: gallery openings for the free wine, weekend cycling, modern art I don't fully get, small exhibitions
profiles.hobbies: biking to galleries across town, pretending to understand abstract art, collecting exhibition postcards
profiles.biography: I curate exhibitions for a living and still don't fully understand half the modern art I hang. Bike everywhere, mostly to galleries with free wine. My apartment wall is just other people's exhibition postcards at this point.

profiles.name: Samuel
profiles.interests: balcony tomatoes, home brew disasters, board game night chaos, weekend cycling
profiles.hobbies: growing tomatoes that mostly survive, brewing beer with mixed results, hosting board game nights that always run too late
profiles.biography: My balcony tomato plants have a 60% survival rate and I consider that a win. Board game nights at my place run until 1am no matter what anyone plans. Home brew is an ongoing science experiment, results vary.

profiles.name: Yasmin
profiles.interests: brand decks, over-edited travel photos, pilates I skip half the time, messy journals
profiles.hobbies: editing travel photos more than actually traveling, pilates I attend inconsistently, journaling in incomplete sentences
profiles.biography: I craft brand stories at work and edit my own travel photos way more than the trip probably deserved. Pilates attendance is aspirational at best. My journal is mostly half-finished thoughts and grocery lists, somehow that works for me.

profiles.name: Owen
profiles.interests: half-built furniture, riverbank fishing, blues records, home brew mishaps
profiles.hobbies: woodworking projects stuck at 80% done, fly fishing with more patience than results, spinning old blues records
profiles.biography: I build houses for work and my own furniture projects sit unfinished in the garage. Fishing trips are mostly an excuse to sit by a river and think. My home brew has a reputation, not always a good one.

profiles.name: Nadia
profiles.interests: half-learned languages, salsa lessons, street food adventures, travel notebooks
profiles.hobbies: duolingo streaks I keep breaking, salsa on Tuesdays, chasing street food stalls with questionable hygiene ratings
profiles.biography: I translate for work and my sixth language is currently stuck at a 40-day duolingo streak, broken and restarted twice. Salsa lessons are the highlight of my week. Will absolutely eat at the sketchy street stall if the line is long enough.

profiles.name: Miles
profiles.interests: light-polluted astrophotography, half-built synthesizers, trail running, weird synth sounds
profiles.hobbies: chasing dark sky spots outside the city, building a synth that mostly makes noise, trail runs before work
profiles.biography: I code for work and chase clear skies for astrophotography, city light pollution ruins most attempts. Building a synthesizer that currently makes one very unpleasant sound on purpose. Trail runs are the only reason I wake up before 7.

profiles.name: Camila
profiles.interests: contemporary dance, foraged herbs I'm unsure about, meditation I fidget through, trail walks
profiles.hobbies: dance classes that leave me sore for days, foraging herbs I look up twice before using, meditation I mostly fidget through
profiles.biography: I help people heal at work and process everything else through dance, badly, but enthusiastically. Foraged herbs are a hobby I approach with appropriate caution and Google. Meditation apps say I've 'started' 40 sessions, finished maybe 6.

profiles.name: Adam
profiles.interests: a vintage car that never starts on the first try, motorsport weekends, whiskey on a budget
profiles.hobbies: restoring a 1967 project car that's tested every ounce of patience I have, watching races with too much snack food, whiskey tasting on a teacher's budget
profiles.biography: I design engines for work and my own vintage car restoration has been 'six months from done' for two years. Race weekends are non-negotiable, snacks included. Whiskey budget is modest, opinions are not.

profiles.name: Ruby
profiles.interests: tattoo flash sketches, punk shows in tiny venues, thrifted band tees, burnt cookies
profiles.hobbies: sketching designs that don't always make it onto skin, chasing punk shows in venues that fit thirty people, baking cookies that come out slightly burnt every time
profiles.biography: I draw on people for work and my own sketchbook is full of ideas that never made the cut. Punk shows in tiny, too-loud venues are my happy place. My cookies are always slightly burnt and I refuse to fix the recipe.

profiles.name: Diego
profiles.interests: street photography, secondhand bikes, cheap street tacos, city walks with no plan
profiles.hobbies: fixing up a bike I bought for too little, wandering neighborhoods with a camera and no destination, ranking taco stands nobody asked me to rank
profiles.biography: I plan cities for work and get lost in them for fun, camera always half-charged. My bike is more duct tape than original parts at this point. I have a personal taco stand ranking, unsolicited opinions guaranteed.

profiles.name: Wren
profiles.interests: second-hand board games, community theatre backstage chaos, loose tea, overdue library books
profiles.hobbies: stage managing shows that always run behind, hoarding board games I rarely get to play, returning library books three weeks late
profiles.biography: I organize other people's books for a living and mine are all overdue somewhere across town. Backstage on show weekends means I've fixed more props with tape than I'd like to admit. Board game shelf is full, actual play time is not.
